Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[C18DF]Runout is reduce due to high temperature or low voltage
[C18E1]Motor Actuator in failure => Link to the Node "MotorActuator"
[C18E2]Compliance Voltage between CAN information and UBB measurement is in failure
[C18E3]EBR signal is invalide link to the Node : "qTargetExternal_Net"
[C18E7]circuit open (e.g. ff_WAKEUP_INPUT_FAILURE)This fault appears when ECU has lost wakeup line during a mission
[C18E8]Current consumption in EDLC is in failure
[C18E9]ECU Internal Failures => link to the DDL : "ECU"
[C18EA]Driver Brake Wish Not Detectable link to the Node
[C18EC]Position sensor plausibility in failure => Link to the Node : "LIPS"
[C18F1]Vehicule speed ot available link to the Node : "VehicleSpeed_Net"
[C18F3]Thermal Failure level 1 shall be link to the Node : MLIThermalDegradation
[C18F9]DTSOffsetSuspiciouis in Failure => CRBS is not Fonctionnal
[U2140]Missing message: ff_ECM_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_ECM_A8_TIMEOUT & ff_ECM_A9_TIMEOUT & ff_ECM_A11_TIMEOUT )
[U2143]Missing message: ff_HEVC_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_HEVC_R17_TIMEOUT & ff_HEVC_R18_TIMEOUT)
[U2148]Missing message: ff_VDC_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_VDC_A8_TIMEOUT & ff_VDC_A11_TIMEOUT & ff_VDC_A12_TIMEOUT )
[U2248]Missing message: ff_VDC_TIMEOUT (on Vehicel1 CAN : ff_VDC_A4_TIMEOUT & ff_VDC_A9_TIMEOUT)
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Device.Name: [C18DF]Runout is reduce due to high temperature or low voltage
[C18E1]Motor Actuator in failure => Link to the Node "MotorActuator"
[C18E2]Compliance Voltage between CAN information and UBB measurement is in failure
[C18E3]EBR signal is invalide link to the Node : "qTargetExternal_Net"
[C18E7]circuit open (e.g. ff_WAKEUP_INPUT_FAILURE)This fault appears when ECU has lost wakeup line during a mission
[C18E8]Current consumption in EDLC is in failure
[C18E9]ECU Internal Failures => link to the DDL : "ECU"
[C18EA]Driver Brake Wish Not Detectable link to the Node
[C18EC]Position sensor plausibility in failure => Link to the Node : "LIPS"
[C18F1]Vehicule speed ot available link to the Node : "VehicleSpeed_Net"
[C18F3]Thermal Failure level 1 shall be link to the Node : MLIThermalDegradation
[C18F9]DTSOffsetSuspiciouis in Failure => CRBS is not Fonctionnal
[U2140]Missing message: ff_ECM_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_ECM_A8_TIMEOUT & ff_ECM_A9_TIMEOUT & ff_ECM_A11_TIMEOUT )
[U2143]Missing message: ff_HEVC_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_HEVC_R17_TIMEOUT & ff_HEVC_R18_TIMEOUT)
[U2148]Missing message: ff_VDC_TIMEOUT (on Chassis CAN : ff_VDC_A8_TIMEOUT & ff_VDC_A11_TIMEOUT & ff_VDC_A12_TIMEOUT )
[U2248]Missing message: ff_VDC_TIMEOUT (on Vehicel1 CAN : ff_VDC_A4_TIMEOUT & ff_VDC_A9_TIMEOUT)
